Title Ending
children.characters:
These Mobile Money Terms and Conditions (“Terms”) govern your use of the digital wallet service provided by Liberty Puerto Rico LLC (“Liberty”, “we”, “us”, or “our”). This service allows customers to store funds, make transactions, and manage payments securely through our mobile app and other digital platforms.
By using Liberty’s Mobile Money service, you agree to these Terms, which apply to all features, transactions, and communications related to the digital wallet. This includes, but is not limited to, the Liberty Mobile Money, any associated web platforms, and any other interactive features we provide now or in the future to facilitate digital payments.
